summary: Iteration 106: Testing Animated Preview feature for Storyboard. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (92%). Both preview endpoints working (generate-preview, preview-status). Frontend: Code review confirms correct implementation of StoryboardPreview component with Ken Burns effect, subtitles, play/pause controls, progress bar, fullscreen mode. MP4 export with ElevenLabs narration endpoint working - generated 17.7MB video file.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 errors due to Supabase 'Server disconnected' connection issues. Transient, not a code bug.

critical_code_review_comments: StoryboardPreview.jsx: Ken Burns CSS animations correctly implemented (kenBurnsIn, kenBurnsPan, kenBurnsOut)

StoryboardPreview.jsx: All required data-testid attributes present (storyboard-preview, close-preview-btn, preview-play-btn, preview-prev-btn, preview-next-btn, toggle-subtitles-btn, preview-fullscreen-btn)
StoryboardPreview.jsx: Subtitles overlay shows dialogue and character names correctly
StoryboardPreview.jsx: Progress bar with panel dots implemented
StoryboardEditor.jsx: 'Preview Animado' button (data-testid='open-preview-btn') opens StoryboardPreview via React portal
StoryboardEditor.jsx: 'Exportar MP4 + Narração' button (data-testid='export-mp4-btn') triggers backend generation
StoryboardEditor.jsx: Download MP4 link (data-testid='download-preview-btn') appears when preview_url is available
StoryboardEditor.jsx: createPortal used correctly to render preview overlay to document.body
Backend preview_generator.py: generate_preview_video() function properly implemented with FFmpeg + ElevenLabs
Backend studio.py: Both preview endpoints implemented (lines 1205-1277)

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - all features correctly implemented

seed_data_creation: Used existing project fce897cf6ba3 with 8 storyboard panels with images
